specSection:
resolveOrCreate :: Topic → (Task, EntryPoint)
resolveOrCreate(T) =
  | isTaskId(T) → (lookupTask(T), fromStatus(lookupTask(T).status))
  | otherwise   → (createTask(T), ProposalLoop)
ground_truth_rationale: Topic is 'task-7' which matches the pattern ^task-\d+$ (case-insensitive). The spec says isTaskId checks for this pattern. This takes the TASK_ID branch.
